overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi horror game showing a character in a futuristic suit exploring the dimly lit corridors of a space station. The character walks through hallways, enters a restroom, continues through darker maintenance tunnels, and finally enters a private quarters to open a storage locker.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceship crew quarters corridor with labeled doors

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor, looking at various doors and signage including the Ash Naderi quarters

entered.detail: white security door with digital display showing 'ASH NADERI' and 'L4' level indicator
tall water dispenser with blue bottle and paper cup holder
green and white sign indicating Level 4 with directional arrow
heavy metal door with warning signage and red digital display

segments.scene_description: The character explores a well-lit corridor of a space station, walking past doors including one labeled 'ASH NADERI' and a water cooler station. The environment features industrial metal paneling and digital door displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: public restroom with sinks and toilet stalls

events.description: character enters the restroom through automatic sliding doors

agents.ego_description: entering the restroom and looking around at the sink area and stalls

entered.detail: automatic sliding glass doors with metal frames
long counter with multiple white sinks and faucets
large rectangular mirror with vertical light strips on sides
metal rack with hanging beige towels
dark metal stall dividers and doors

segments.scene_description: The character enters a public restroom through automatic doors, revealing a brightly lit interior with sinks, mirrors, and towel racks. The space has vertical light panels and toilet stalls visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit maintenance corridor with red emergency lighting

events.description: exits restroom back into the darker corridor section

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit corridor with red accent lighting

entered.detail: narrow hallway with reduced lighting and industrial wall panels
illuminated red strips running along the floor edges
dark doorways with red warning lights visible at the end of the hall

segments.scene_description: Exiting the restroom, the character proceeds through darker maintenance corridors illuminated by red floor lighting strips and dim overhead fixtures. The atmosphere becomes more ominous as the character walks deeper into the station.

scene_state.functional_zone: small private quarters with desk and storage locker

events.description: enters a small private room through a security door
character approaches and opens the metal storage locker

agents.ego_description: entering the room and opening the metal storage locker to look inside

entered.detail: metal security door with access panel and window
tall dark metal cabinet with two doors and silver handles
desk with computer terminal, keyboard, and stacked books
black office chair in front of the desk

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small private quarters containing a desk with a computer and books. Approaching a metal storage locker, the character opens it to reveal items stored inside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a space station that transitions from sterile, well-lit corridors into dark, ominous maintenance tunnels and finally into a cramped private room. It begins by tracking the character past industrial metal paneling and a water cooler station, passing a door labeled Ash Naderi. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a brightly lit public restroom filled with mirrors and vertical light panels before shifting back into the hallway. The environment then grows increasingly dim and oppressive, guided by red floor lighting strips as the camera follows the character deeper into the station's maintenance corridors. Finally, the movement concludes as the character enters a small private quarters, approaching a desk and opening a metal storage locker to reveal the items inside.
